Functionality

Values below match the bit positions in the SYSTEM__MODE_START register do not change. More...

Collaboration diagram for - SingleShot, BackToBack & timed:

Macros

#define VL53L1_DEVICEMEASUREMENTMODE_MODE_MASK   0xF0
 
#define VL53L1_DEVICEMEASUREMENTMODE_STOP_MASK   0x0F
 
#define VL53L1_GROUPEDPARAMETERHOLD_ID_MASK   0x02
 

Detailed Description

Values below match the bit positions in the SYSTEM__MODE_START register do not change.
